signal_discovery_candidates.methodology: Each signal tested individually using validation_framework.py with walk-forward validation across 2019-2020, 2021-2022, 2023-2024 periods. Crisis labeling: ±30 days around 16 known turning points. Success criteria: >30% precision, <15% false positive rate, >3x crisis specificity.

vix_signals.rationale: VIX represents fear/uncertainty, spikes coincide with market stress. More stable than regime-based signals.

candidates.name: VIX_persistent_elevation
candidates.logic: Sustained fear, not just single-day spikes. Captures extended uncertainty periods.
candidates.crisis_rationale: Most market crashes involve sustained volatility elevation, not just single spikes

candidates.name: VIX_crisis_spike
candidates.logic: Extreme fear threshold historically associated with crisis moments
candidates.crisis_rationale: VIX >40 rare event, typically occurs during sharp selloffs

candidates.name: VIX_term_structure_inversion
candidates.logic: Near-term vol > long-term vol indicates acute stress
candidates.crisis_rationale: Vol curve inversion signals immediate stress vs long-term concerns
candidates.data_availability: May need alternative vol term structure proxy

credit_signals.rationale: Credit spreads reflect funding stress and risk appetite. HY spreads particularly sensitive to crisis conditions.

candidates.name: HY_crisis_threshold
candidates.logic: HY spreads >600bp historically mark severe stress periods
candidates.crisis_rationale: Credit stress precedes/coincides with equity stress in most crashes

candidates.name: HY_momentum_breakdown
candidates.description: HY spreads widening >100bp in 5 trading days
candidates.logic: Rapid credit deterioration signals acute stress
candidates.crisis_rationale: Speed of credit deterioration matters - slow drift vs rapid breakdown

candidates.name: IG_HY_spread_blowout
candidates.logic: Risk premium between HY and IG widens in stress
candidates.crisis_rationale: Flight to quality increases quality premium

yield_curve_signals.rationale: Yield curve shape reflects economic expectations and Fed policy stress. Inversions historically precede recessions.

candidates.name: yield_curve_deep_inversion
candidates.logic: Deep inversion indicates severe policy tightening stress
candidates.crisis_rationale: Deep inversions historically precede recessions and market stress

candidates.name: yield_curve_persistent_inversion
candidates.logic: Sustained inversion more predictive than brief inversions
candidates.expected_fire_rate: 5-15% of trading days during inversion cycles
candidates.crisis_rationale: Persistent inversions indicate structural policy/growth concerns

candidates.name: real_yield_spike
candidates.logic: High real rates indicate tight financial conditions
candidates.crisis_rationale: High real rates pressure asset valuations, funding costs

breadth_signals.rationale: Market breadth deterioration often precedes major declines. Concentration in few names signals vulnerability.

candidates.name: breadth_breakdown
candidates.logic: Index breaks long-term support while breadth deteriorates
candidates.crisis_rationale: Index can be held up by few large stocks while majority weakens

candidates.name: new_lows_domination
candidates.description: NYSE new 52w lows > new highs for 10+ days
candidates.logic: Sustained deterioration in individual stock performance
candidates.crisis_rationale: Market weakness spreads to individual names in bear markets
candidates.data_availability: Need to source NYSE breadth data

candidates.name: small_cap_breakdown
candidates.logic: Small caps more sensitive to economic/credit stress
candidates.crisis_rationale: Small caps decline first in economic stress, credit sensitivity

momentum_signals.rationale: Momentum breaks often coincide with major trend changes. Acceleration changes can signal regime shifts.

candidates.name: momentum_acceleration_break
candidates.logic: Rapid deceleration in price momentum signals trend exhaustion
candidates.crisis_rationale: Trend changes often involve momentum acceleration breaks

candidates.name: moving_average_breakdown
candidates.description: SPY breaks 200-day MA with volume confirmation
candidates.logic: Long-term support break with volume indicates institutional selling
candidates.crisis_rationale: 200-day MA breaks often mark major trend changes

multi_asset_signals.rationale: Crisis often involves multiple asset class stress. Cross-asset signals may be more robust.

candidates.name: flight_to_quality
candidates.description: TLT outperforming SPY by >2% over 5 days
candidates.logic: Bond outperformance during equity stress (flight to safety)
candidates.crisis_rationale: Flight to quality characteristic of risk-off periods

candidates.name: dollar_stress_signal
candidates.logic: Strong dollar + high volatility indicates global stress
candidates.crisis_rationale: Dollar strength + volatility indicates global deleveraging

success_criteria.crisis_specificity: >3x fire rate in crisis vs normal

implementation_notes.signal_priority: Test HIGH priority signals first - most likely to succeed
implementation_notes.data_availability: Some signals require data not currently cached (NYSE breadth, VIX9D)
implementation_notes.threshold_optimization: Use ROC optimization on training data, test on validation periods
implementation_notes.single_signal_focus: Test each signal individually before any combinations
implementation_notes.documentation: Document all failed signals to prevent retesting same approaches
